untranslatable_reason: Signal references [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] placeholders for pullback_depth_percent and base_formation_bars that require domain-specific calibration. Multi-timeframe confirmation logic cannot be fully expressed with single-timeframe indicators. Exact 'failure pattern' definition across timeframes is ambiguous without explicit threshold values.
translation_notes: Used Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) as breakout structure detector. Volume confirmation via vol_ratio_20 > 1.0. Exit conditions based on pullback failure (close back through entry level). Parameters pullback_depth_percent and base_formation_bars must be calibrated separately (suggested: 38.2% Fibonacci for pullback, 10-20 bars for base formation). Multi-timeframe bias confirmation requires external regime filter or manual HTF validation.
